name: NRHIS Sprint 2 Build053 NOAA NWPS Forecast and Flood Threshold Harvest
features: harvest NOAA/NWS National Water Prediction Service gauge metadata and stage-flow products
capture official NWS forecast series separately from USGS observations
normalize action, minor, moderate, and major flood thresholds for configured Nueces Basin gauges
calculate forecast peak timing and threshold exceedance status
archive raw NOAA API responses with SHA-256 evidence
write forecast, threshold, station-status, readiness, and run-receipt products
preserves: USGS as the primary source for current observed discharge, stage, and water-quality values
production USGS current-condition harvest from Build050
incremental updates and data-quality gates from Build052
workflow contract preflight and CI parity gates
pre-release publication, verification, archival, and next-build chaining
